content.en:
"Wanfa Daozi, you really dare to come!"

Baili Zhenjun's eyes narrowed slightly, slightly surprised.

In fact, he made these preparations just to watch out for Ye Tian, not really thinking that Ye Tian would come.

After all, the strength of the Demon Sound Sect is not weak, if the entire Void Heaven Hall is killed, it will be about the same.

But if it's just Ye Tian, it's really not enough to watch.

No matter how strong Ye Tian's ability to save his life is, he will die if he is not careful.

Moreover, Ye Tian, who had just stepped into the half-step True Spirit Realm, still had a lot of room for improvement, and he could cultivate step by step, step into the True Monarch level, and then come to trouble the Demon Yin Sect!

Of course, Ye Tian is now looking for trouble with the Demon Sound Sect, this is also the scene that everyone in the Demon Sound Sect is looking forward to the most, they are very hopeful of completely killing Ye Tian.

With the background of the Demon Sound Sect, even if they killed a Dao Ancestor, they would not have any trouble, and they would not be tied up like other small forces.

"Open the Great Array!"

"The First Line World Array!"

"Billions of Void Arrays!"

"Soul Confinement Array!"

"Void Array!"

......

A large array opened, covering this area.

The power of these large arrays is not very great, basically they are not offensive large arrays, but auxiliary large arrays to prevent Ye Tian from escaping or suppress Ye Tian's strength.

Of course, the most fundamental way for the Demon Sound Sect to prevent Ye Tian from escaping was to rely on that secret technique of simplifying the Origin Divine Power, that is, the Void Forbidden!

The air ban is a secret technique specifically for space shuttle, as long as it does not reach the level of the origin of the divine power, it can be banned one by one, even if the great realm is moved, there is no way to break through the blockade of the air ban.

The air ban requires the joint use of the ten True Monarchs, but because these ten True Monarchs do not have a high degree of mastery of the air ban, they need to pay a certain price before they can cast the air ban.

But as long as Ye Tian is left, it is worth paying a little price.

Woohoo!!

Ten True Monarchs appeared within the Demon Sound Sect, and instantly appeared at the ten formation bases of many large arrays, and immediately began to jointly perform the secret technique of air forbidden.

The next moment.

An invisible light curtain enveloped this area, and at this moment, not only Ye Tian could not shuttle away, but even the people of the Demon Sound Sect could not shuttle away, and all of them were blocked in this area.

Of course, if those ten True Monarchs fell and died, the Void Forbidden would naturally disappear.

But those ten True Monarchs had been protected by layers of large arrays, and while these large arrays suppressed Ye Tian, most of the forces were also to protect them.

"Hahaha, Wanfa Daozi, you didn't expect it, under the air ban, even if your Great Realm Shift cultivation reaches the extreme level, don't think about shuttling away. This time, you're dead!"

Baili Zhenjun laughed wildly.

He wanted to see anger or fear in Ye Tian's eyes, but Ye Tian's eyes were like a calm lake, without any waves at all, as if he didn't care about Baili Zhenjun's words.

Ye Tian looked at the people of the Demon Yin Sect and said softly: "Baili Zhenjun, hundreds of millions of years of growth, you still underestimate me." Why do you think I have stayed in the Heavenly Monarch for hundreds of millions of years, my strength is far from what you can imagine. The price of underestimating me is death!"

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian erupted with a terrifying momentum, and the Origin Divine Power Blood River True Body was unleashed.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body was indestructible, and his qi and blood were so powerful that it was like a boundless river of blood, and no amount of strength could wipe out his body.

Seeing this scene, Baili Zhenjun and the others trembled.

They felt the breath of the Origin Divine Power, although it was a very weak breath, but it was also the Origin Divine Power!

"You have created the Origin Divine Power, impossible, you are only a half-step True Spirit, how can you create the Origin Divine Power!"

Baili Zhenjun said in horror.

The Origin Divine Power is a magical power that only True Ancestors can involve, and some weak True Ancestors don't even have the Origin Talent, so they can't create the Origin Divine Power, and they don't know the Origin Divine Power at all.

Knowing the Origin Divine Power and not knowing the Origin Divine Power is a dividing line between whether the True Ancestor is strong or not, but Ye Tian, who is only in the half-step True Spirit Realm, actually has the Origin Divine Power, which is simply incredible.

Now, he finally understood why Ye Tian had stayed at the Heavenly Monarch level for a long time, because Ye Tian had actually created the Origin Divine Power at the Heavenly Monarch level, no wonder it had been delayed for so long.

But what he didn't understand was that creating the Origin Divine Power at the Heavenly Monarch level could not increase the foundation, but it only made his combat power stronger, so why not enter the True Monarch first, and then slowly create the Origin Divine Power?

What he didn't know was that Ye Tian also wanted to break through the half-step True Spirit Realm, but if he didn't complete the unity of spirit and spirit, there was no way to break through at all!

"Up, all up, kill him at all costs!"

Baili Zhenjun shouted.

Whew!!!

The dense Heavenly Monarchs, Half-Step True Spirits, and many True Monarchs all launched an attack on Ye Tian.

If he didn't have the Origin Divine Power Blood River True Body, Ye Tian really might not be able to resist the attacks of these powerhouses, after all, in the face of so many attacks from True Monarchs and Half-Step True Spirits, the Blood River Immortal Technique was no longer enough.

But with the blessing of many magical powers such as the Blood River True Body and the Blood River Immortal Technique, Ye Tian was almost unbreakable.

They couldn't break through Ye Tian's defenses, but Ye Tian's attack was enough to kill them.

Rumble!!!!

The boundless flames turned into fire dragons and swept around, and a famous Heavenly Monarch was burned to ashes by the flames.

The power of the Eternal Immortal Immortal Divine Power was too terrifying, and it killed many Heavenly Monarchs and half-step True Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect in an instant, and even two True Monarchs couldn't dodge for a while, and were directly killed.

"Use your hole cards!"

Baili Zhenjun said.

Immediately, a number of True Monarchs took out the mutilated half-way weapon.

Many treasures have been born in the Great Universe for hundreds of millions of years, many of which can be used to refine half-Dao weapons or even Dao weapons, but refining half-Dao weapons requires at least a top-notch True Monarch or True Ancestor to do so.

They can't refine half-Dao weapons, but they can refine mutilated Dao weapons, and their power is far above the Chaos Arcana.

At this moment, these True Monarchs burst out with the power of the half-way weapon, and at the expense of the half-way weapon, they delivered a fatal blow.

I saw a long sword-like half-dao weapon burst open, turning into a terrifying sword light, instantly breaking Ye Tian's Blood River True Body.

Burst!

The sword light penetrated through the body, piercing Ye Tian's heart, leaving a small hole.

"Such a strong half-way, I didn't expect that sacrificing a mutilated half-way weapon could actually break my defense!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This also proves that his origin talent is a bit weak, but there is no way, his realm is too low, and it is already very good to be able to create origin supernatural powers, how can he create those powerful origin supernatural powers.

"However, it's useless to break the defense, when I only knew the Blood River Immortal Technique, you blew me up again and again, but you couldn't wipe me out, and now just breaking the defense is just a minor injury for me!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian's broken heart recovered instantly, and the small holes in his body were healed, and no injuries existed at all.

The other half-dao weapons also broke Ye Tian's defense one by one, but they couldn't hit Ye Tian hard, and they only brought a little trouble to Ye Tian.

Time passed little by little, and there were too many Heavenly Monarchs and half-step True Spirits who had fallen from the Demon Sound Sect, and even the True Monarchs were gradually numbered.

At this moment, the entire Demon Sound Sect fell into fear.
